productDisplayName: Clarks Men Feeling Good Leather Brown Formal Shoes
description: A perfect everyday wear footwear, the Feeling Good leather shoe sure does exude a lot of good feeling vibes. Perfect for those occasions when you want a smart look with a relaxed touch, this full grain leather shoe comes with Soft Tread cushioning to deliver exceptional comfort.UpperFull grain leather upper for absolute durability, breathability, comfort and styleLacing system offering a snug, customized FitHairsheep inner lining for absolute comfort and abrasion-free liningBrand badge on lateral ankle for styleMidsolePU midsole for lightweight, flexible comfortSoft Tread footbed for all-day cushioned comfort OutsoleLeather and rubber mixed outsole for absolute durabilityTriangular lugs in the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
